reasoning: Myanmar Junta chief Min Aung Hlaing explicitly announced in March 2025 that the national election will take place in December 2025 or January 2026. The resolution date is 1 July 2025. Given that the current date is 8 June 2025 and elections are officially scheduled for late 2025 or early 2026, it is practically impossible for them to occur by the resolution date. The election has been frequently pushed back and the latest timeline definitively places it outside the resolution window. In addition, the crowd forecast was ~1% at the end of May 2025. Therefore, a probability at the floor (2%) is assigned.
